source: Automated Phase 6 focused tests and Playwright browser proof

browserProof.assertion: Combat debug overlay shows Input: locked playback and Request: combat-ui-1 last=combat-ui-1 exp=1 while End Turn is disabled during playback.
After playback settles, the stale disabled feedback is cleared, End Turn is usable again, and the accepted request remains last=combat-ui-1 exp=1.

automatedOverlayAssertions.test: renders the latest request rejection diagnostic

automatedRequestGuards.test: accepts one gameplay request and blocks a double-submit while playback is locked
automatedRequestGuards.guarantee: The first request mutates combat once; the second playback-locked submit returns ActionRejected input_locked and does not call the action callback.

automatedRequestGuards.test: records stale and duplicate request diagnostics from controller rejections
automatedRequestGuards.guarantee: Stale revision produces stale_combat_revision at combat.revision, and duplicate request ids produce duplicate_request at requestId.

automatedRequestGuards.test: rejects duplicate gameplay request ids before applying a second action
automatedRequestGuards.guarantee: Duplicate gameplay request ids preserve the previous combat state.
